rulings.Case Title: DEBORA SILVERMAN VS. MURPHY SAN FRANCISCO LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Deposition Of Denis Murphy And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 11, 2013, line 1 - PLAINTIFF DEBORA SILVERMAN's Motion To Compel Further Deposition Of Denis Murphy And For Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Further Deposition of Denis Murphy GRANTED in part and DENIED in part as follows: Deposition of Denis Murphy shall proceed only regarding 739 Haight Street mouse infestation "resulting in constructive eviction of Plaintiff (Complaint paragraph 20, 109), including any internal policies on dealing with vermin and rodent infestation on these premises. Request for sanctions is DENIED. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEBORA SILVERMAN VS. MURPHY SAN FRANCISCO LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Deposition Of Batholomew Murphy
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 11, 2013, line 1 - PLAINTIFF DEBORA SILVERMAN's Motion To Compel Further Deposition Of Batholomew Murphy. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Further Deposition of Bartholomew Murphy is DENIED. Plaintiff's counsel, Lifschitz, (one of two counsels for Plaintiff appearing on the Deposition record) refused to address Defendant's concern of potential streaming of deposition without notice or consent. Moving party fails to cite any legal authority on point relating to streaming of depositions or not addressing deponent's concerns of such streaming. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRIANNA MANNION et al VS. JOHN E. WAI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 11, 2013, line 2 - PLAINTIFF BRIANNA MANNION AND TRAVIS LARIMER'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint. Plaintiffs' Motion for Leave to File Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1320-1380 LOMBARD STREET, LLC VS. LETICIA GONZALES et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 11, 2013, line 7 - PLAINTIFF 1320-1380 LOMBARD STREET, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to shift burden and establish that Mr. Geddes is interested party ("permanent resident of the building") within the meaning of SF Administrative Code 41A.4(g); even if Plaintiff shifted burden, triable issue of fact exists whether 1340 Lombard Street and 1360 Lombard Street is the "building in which the tourist or transient use is alleged to occur" within the meaning of SF Administrative Code 41A.4(g)=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WAI AHEAD, LLC VS. JOSEPH ATSUS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 11, 2013, line 3 - PLAINTIFF WAI AHEAD, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is continued to June 14, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of its motion to Department 501 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than June 11, 2013. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JESSE DEANE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 11, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT JESSE DEANE'S Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment. Defendant's Motion to Vacate Default and Default Judgment is granted, subject to (1) opposition; (2) filing answer no later than June 11, 2013; and (3) posting $3,632 with the Court no later than June 11, 2013. =(501/REQ)
